title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue is visible on the Home Screen
scenario: Location sharing dialogue appears on Home Screen after accepting license agreement, tapping Continue, Skip, and Continue as Guest or Login.
steps: Start the app for the first time.
Accept the license agreement and privacy policy.
Tap Continue as Guest or Login.
expected: The location sharing dialogue is visible on the Home Screen, displaying the headline "Allow 'Poly Lens' to use your location?" with options 'Allow Once', 'Allow While Using App', and 'Don't Allow', along with text explaining that Poly Lens uses location to find the user's device.
